title: Astonish Window and Glass Cleaner, Vegan and Cruelty Free Spray, 750ml, Lemon
features: Powerful Cleaning: Tough on stains and grease, this glass cleaner will leave your windows with a brilliant crystal-clear finish
Streak Free: Formulated with a wipe off formula, this spray infused with vinegar powerfully cleans window and glass without leaving any smears or streaks for a clear finish
Cleans and Polishes: One bottle that goes a long way, as it effectively cleans and polishes all window and glass to remove smears and stains instantly
Fresh Scent: Blended with zesty lemon oils for a fresh clean smell, leaving your room smelling fabulous and fresh
Vegan: Here at Astonish, we care about our impact and the environment, that’s why all our products are vegan and cruelty-free
description: Product Description Astonish Window and Glass Cleaner Eucalyptus & Lemon Ingredients <5% Non-Ionic, Surfactants, Perfumes. Directions How to Use: Spray and wipe with a dry paper towel or lint-free cloth.Caution: Avoid contact with acid sensitive surfaces such as marble and limestone. Do not use on varnished, polished or unsealed wood. Wipe up spills immediately. Condensation may form on cold glass which will clear.KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Causes skin irritation. Causes serious eye irritation. Wear protective gloves and eye protection. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do so. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. IF ON SKIN: Wash with plenty of soap and water. If skin irritation occurs: Get medical advice/attention. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Contact with acids liberates toxic gases Manufacturer Contact Information UK: The London Oil Refining Company Ltd., Bradford, BD3 7AF. EU: Astonish Cleaners Europe Ltd, Dublin, Republic of Ireland, K67 E0A2. See more
